config.exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude from the tree view and selection.
config.customPrompts.description: Define your custom prompts here as key-value pairs (Label: Prompt Content).
config.visibleButtons.description: Select which buttons are visible in the view title bar (Max 6 recommended).
config.outputFormat.description: Select the output format for the generated content.
config.maxFileSizeKB.description: Threshold for giant file guard (KB). Files exceeding this size will have their content omitted.
config.autoRefreshTree.description: Automatically refresh the file tree when files are created, changed, or deleted.
config.openAfterGenerate.description: Open the generated content in a new editor tab.
config.alwaysAddPatchInstructions.descri: Automatically append patch formatting instructions to the end of generated prompts.
config.openAfterGitAction.description: Open the generated content in a new editor tab after a Git action (like generating a commit prompt).
config.gitCommitPrompt.description: Prompt template for generating git commit messages. The {{diff}} variable will be replaced with the actual diff.
prompt.implementFeature:
## Request
Implement a new feature [feature name here] based on the project structure and code.

## Structure
{{tree}}

## Constraints
- Follow existing design patterns (DDD/Clean Architecture, etc.).
- Ensure type safety and avoid using 'any'.
- Suggest related unit tests.

## Language
Please respond in English.
prompt.refactor:
## Request
Please provide refactoring suggestions for the provided code.

## Structure
{{tree}}

## Aspects
- Improved readability (naming, function splitting)
- Performance optimization
- Loose coupling and high cohesion
- DRY principle

## Format
Provide reasons for each change along with the modified code.
prompt.bugFix:
## Situation
A bug is occurring in the following code: [describe the problem].

## Structure
{{tree}}

## Tasks
- Identify the cause and explain it
- Provide a fix
- Suggest test cases to prevent recurrence

## Context
Time: {{datetime}}
Env: {{language}}
prompt.unitTest:
## Request
Write unit tests for the following source code.

## Structure
{{tree}}

## Requirements
- Framework: [e.g., Vitest/Jest]
- Include boundary and edge cases.
- Show how to create mocks if needed.
- Aim for good coverage.
prompt.codeReview:
## Request
You are a senior full-stack engineer. Review the submitted code strictly but constructively.

## Structure
{{tree}}

## Checklist
- Potential bugs
- Security vulnerabilities
- Performance concerns
- Best practices
prompt.patchInjection:
---
## IMPORTANT: Output Format Specification (Patch Mode)
When suggesting changes, you MUST specify the relative file path before each code block in the format `path/to/file.ts`: and use omission comments like `// ... existing code ...` (with 1-2 anchor lines around them) for unchanged parts.
prompt.gitCommit:
You are a professional software engineer. Analyze the following git diff and generate a commit message prompt based on best practices.

## Constraints
- Use a summary line on the first line, and detailed bullet points from the third line.
- Output in English.

## type definitions
- feat: New feature
- fix: Bug fix
- refactor: Code cleanup without functional changes
- perf: Performance improvement
- test: Add/update tests
- chore: Build config, dependencies, documentation, etc.

## git diff
{{diff}}
